Metadata.title: Paincave — Endurance Training Intelligence
Metadata.description: AI-free endurance training coach for cycling, running, and swimming. Science-backed workouts, nutrition targets, and fitness tracking.

Footer.tagline: Science-backed endurance training for cyclists, runners, and swimmers.
Footer.disclaimer: Not medical or dietary advice. Consult a healthcare professional before starting any training program.

Hero.title: The complete platform for endurance athletes
Hero.description: Fitness analytics, smart coaching, nutrition targets, health tracking, and workout export — unified across cycling, running, and swimming. All metrics calculated internally. Every recommendation backed by research.

FitnessTimeline.title: See your fitness, fatigue, and form at a glance
FitnessTimeline.description: The Performance Management Chart tracks your Chronic Training Load (CTL), Acute Training Load (ATL), and Training Stress Balance (TSB) across all three sports in one unified view.
FitnessTimeline.feature1: Unified CTL/ATL/TSB across cycling, running, and swimming
FitnessTimeline.feature2: Sport-specific TSS breakdown with color coding
FitnessTimeline.feature3: Plain-language insights: "Fresh — ready for hard sessions"
FitnessTimeline.feature4: Adjustable range: 30 days to full history

SmartCoaching.title: A workout pool, not a rigid schedule
SmartCoaching.description: The rule-based coaching engine prescribes a weekly pool of workouts tailored to your training phase, current fitness, and recovery status. You pick when to do them.
SmartCoaching.feature1: Periodized plans: Base, Build, Peak, Taper phases
SmartCoaching.feature2: Mid-week adjustments based on actual load vs target
SmartCoaching.feature3: Safety checks prevent overreaching and injury
SmartCoaching.feature4: Event mode with race-day tapering strategy

MultiSport.title: Three sports. One unified platform.
MultiSport.description: Sport-specific metrics calculated internally with full transparency. Combined daily TSS feeds a unified fatigue model.

NutritionFeature.title: Fuel your training with science-backed targets
NutritionFeature.description: Daily macro targets periodized by training day. Ride fueling plans with glucose:fructose ratios from 2025 research. No food logging — just clear targets.
NutritionFeature.feature1: Periodized carbs: high on hard days, moderate on easy days
NutritionFeature.feature3: Post-ride recovery window with protein + carb targets
NutritionFeature.feature4: Hydration and sodium recommendations per session

HealthTracking.title: Recovery-aware coaching that adapts to you
HealthTracking.description: HRV, resting heart rate, and sleep data from Garmin feed directly into coaching decisions. Declining HRV + poor sleep automatically triggers a recovery day.
HealthTracking.feature1: HRV trend analysis with baseline comparison
HealthTracking.feature2: Resting HR tracking detects early overtraining
HealthTracking.feature3: Sleep quality scoring influences next-day training
HealthTracking.feature4: Automatic recovery recommendations when metrics dip

MoreFeatures.title: Everything else you need
MoreFeatures.description: Export workouts, track your calendar, monitor your zones — all built in.
MoreFeatures.workoutExportDesc: Export to Zwift (ZWO), Garmin (FIT), smart trainers (MRC/ERG), or any calendar app (ICS). Train anywhere with any device.
MoreFeatures.trainingCalendarDesc: Visual calendar with sport-coded activities and planned workouts. See your training week at a glance.
MoreFeatures.trainingZonesDesc: Sport-specific zone calculators. Coggan 7-zone for cycling, 6-zone pace for running, CSS 5-zone for swimming.

HowItWorks.title: Up and running in 2 minutes
HowItWorks.description: No manual data entry. No complex setup. Just connect and go.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: One-click OAuth. We import your entire history and auto-detect your FTP, threshold pace, and CSS.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Choose event mode or fitness gain. The engine generates a weekly workout pool tailored to your phase and fitness.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Do the workouts when it suits you. We track your load, adjust mid-week, and show you exactly where you stand.

WhyUs.title: Why athletes choose Paincave
WhyUs.description: Proven sports science. Full transparency. Built for athletes who want to understand their training, not just follow instructions.
WhyUs.transparentDesc: Every metric is calculated in front of you. See exactly how your TSS, FTP, and zones are derived.
WhyUs.researchBackedDesc: Coggan power model, Skiba W’bal, Banister impulse-response — peer-reviewed science, not guesswork.
WhyUs.fitsYourLifeDesc: A weekly workout pool you schedule around your life. Miss a day? The plan rebalances automatically.
WhyUs.multiSportNativeDesc: Cycling, running, and swimming share one unified fatigue model — built together from day one.

PricingPreview.title: Simple pricing
PricingPreview.description: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
PricingPreview.freeDesc: Get started with basic metrics and 90-day history.
PricingPreview.proDesc: Full coaching engine, nutrition, and workout export.

BottomCta.title: Ready to train smarter?
BottomCta.description: Connect Strava, get your metrics, and start your first week of structured training. Free forever — upgrade when you're ready.

Pricing.metaDescription: Free and Pro plans for endurance athletes. Start with basic metrics or unlock coaching, nutrition targets, and workout export.
Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.description: No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. Start with Free and upgrade when you're ready.
Pricing.footnote1: All plans include: AES-256-GCM encrypted data, GDPR compliance, data export.
Pricing.footnote2: Garmin + Wahoo integration coming soon (included in Pro).

Login.description: Sign in to your training account
